Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Tyril]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 13''' — Tyril is a High Councilor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 13''' — Tyril produces a blade that resembles a short sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 15''' — Tyril is a fighter using a knife.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 15''' — Tyril was leaning against a wall catching his breath.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 26''' — Tyril is the third and final High Councilor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 26''' — Tyril was napping in his chair.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — Tyril wore black without a shroud over his face.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 21''' — Tyril is the High Shepherd.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 21''' — Tyril physically dragged Yala off.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
